content.full_text:
3879 Abbey Court  
Newbury Park, CA 91320  
September 25, 1990

Ms. Alice Hughes  
State of California  
Fair Political Practices Comm.  
Tech. Assist. and Anal. Div.  
1100 K St., P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Subject: CAMPAIGN COMMITTEE NO. 861693 (OPENED 1986)

Dear Ms. Hughes:

As a result of your recommendations discussed in our telecon on September 19, the following actions will be taken:

1. Candidate's personal loan to Campaign Committee No. 902041 (opened 1990).

On August 2, 1990, the proceeds of this loan ($400.00) were inadvertently deposited to the checking account linked with Committee No. 861693 and check no. 130 (copy attached) was written to pay the candidate's filing fees for the 1990 campaign associated with Committee No. 902041. This loan will be listed within Forms 420 and/or 490, as financial reports for Committee 902041 are prepared and submitted. Committee 861693 will treat this $400.00 as a donation to Committee 902041 in its financial reporting. Checking account records for Committee No. 861693 will be retained, as necessary for record purposes.

2. Disposition of Surplus Funds from Committee No. 861693:

Following completion of Item 1 above, the surplus funds from this committee (approximately $100.00) will be donated to Committee No. 902041 and the checking account for Comm. No. 861693 will be closed.

3. Termination of Committee No. 861693:

Following completion of steps 1 and 2 above, I will initiate and file a Form 415 (Statement of Termination), ending the activities of Comm. No. 861693.

I thank you for your assistance in this matter and would appreciate your written acknowledgement, concurring with the above plan of action.

Sincerely,

[Signature]
Denny D. Radashaw  
Treasurer, Campaign Committees No. 861693 and 902041
